deformetricar 1.0.0
  • Reference
    • Warping a mosquito brain onto the fly by cross-identified neuropils
    • A FAFB left-right brain registration
    • Symmetrising the L1 larval CNS and finding left-right cognates
    • Warping maleCNS DA1 projection neurons onto the BANC

deformetricar: an R client for the Deformetrica shape-registration toolkit

Source: R/deformetricar.R
deformetricar-package.Rd

deformetricar wraps the Deformetrica (>= 4.3) command-line tools for statistical shape analysis: it fits diffeomorphisms between point clouds, neuron backbones and surface meshes, and applies them by geodesic shooting. It also reads and writes VTK object formats.

Package options

deformetricar.exe

Path to (or name of) the deformetrica executable; consulted by find_deformetrica. Set it in your Rprofile if Deformetrica is not on the PATH or in a conda environment.

References

https://www.deformetrica.org

See also

find_deformetrica, deformetrica_register, deformetrica_shoot
